name: sunset-thermal
description: Thermal monitoring, auction, and async budget management. Tracks per-device temperature, utilization, and power draw; runs thermal auctions to allocate slots; enforces async budget caps.

skills.name: Thermal Monitor
skills.description: Stream real-time thermal telemetry: temperature, utilization, power draw per device
examples: Stream thermal telemetry for all GPUs on node delta-3

skills.name: Thermal Auction
skills.description: Run a Vickrey-style auction to allocate limited thermal slots among competing agents
examples: Run thermal auction for 8 slots with bids from breeder and compiler agents

skills.name: Async Budget
skills.description: Manage async thermal budget caps: set, query, and enforce per-agent thermal quotas
examples: Set async budget for breeder to 150W TDP on node delta-3

skills.name: Parent Sacrifice
skills.description: Allow a parent agent to release its thermal slot before its child is spawned
examples: Agent_42 sacrifices its slot so agent_43 can spawn
